compiled_state.title: [blue-team-filter]: adversarial review output written to repo .claude/artifacts/ -> artifact persists in git instead of temp directory
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Observed in a host project: dso:blue-team-filter created .claude/artifacts/adversarial-review-241f-ce0d.json in the repo working tree instead of the temporary artifacts directory (get_artifacts_dir() -> /tmp/workflow-plugin-<hash>/). This causes the artifact to show up in git status and potentially be committed. Expected: all agent artifacts write to the temp artifacts directory, not to .claude/artifacts/ in the repo. Actual: blue-team-filter wrote to .claude/artifacts/ in the repo root.
